author: mudnug
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Provides text-to-speech (TTS) for notes or clipped articles by reading them aloud while highlighting words. Offers on-device and online TTS.

manifest.author: m
manifest.description: Provides text-to-speech (TTS) for notes or clipped articles by reading them aloud while highlighting words. Offers on-device and online voice providers.
manifest.name: Note Reader

name: Note Reader

releases.author: mudnug
releases.description:
Discontinuing mobile support: The mobile experience does not meet quality standards. A dedicated text-to-speech app is recommended for mobile use.

Audio files can still be generated on desktop via the Obsidian note reader plugin and synchronized to a mobile device for playback in any audiobook or media player. The desktop version supports exporting audio for a single note or an entire folder of notes in one operation.

releases.author: mudnug
releases.description: Allow highlighting to continue even when user makes edits after the highlight point

releases.author: mudnug
releases.description:
- **Smart Highlight Recovery** — If you edit your notes mid-playback, highlighting now adjusts to stay in sync, as long as edit are above the area being read.
- **Pause & Resume with Position Memory** — Pausing now visually shows exactly where you left off.
- **Resume Reading Position** — The plugin remembers your last spot even after closing Obsidian. (optional)
- **Choose Audio File Location** — New options to control where generated audio is saved.
- **More Voices + Filtering** — Added more voices and a language/region filter.
- **Theme Gallery** — Preview all highlight themes in a gallery view.

releases.author: mudnug
releases.description:
- **Cancel audio generation anytime** – You can now stop audio generation mid-process if you change your mind by closing the tab
- **Cleaner look** – Same familiar appearance, now using Obsidian's official SettingGroup API for better consistency with the rest of Obsidian
- **Online TTS no longer available on mobile** – The online voice provider has made changes that prevent mobile support. Mobile users can still use local voices installed on their device.
